name: watermarking-authenticity
description: MEOK AI Labs — EU AI Act Article 50 watermarking compliance. C2PA metadata, content provenance, AI detection.

tools.name: check_watermark_compliance
tools.description: Check if AI-generated content meets EU AI Act Article 50 watermarking requirements.

tools.name: generate_c2pa_manifest
tools.description: Generate C2PA (Content Authenticity Initiative) manifest data for AI-generated content.

tools.name: detect_ai_content
tools.description: Analyze text for AI-generated patterns (perplexity, burstiness, vocabulary distribution).

tools.name: watermarking_readiness
tools.description: Assess organization readiness for EU AI Act Article 50 watermarking obligations.

tools.name: get_article_50_timeline
tools.description: Get EU AI Act Article 50 implementation timeline and requirements.
